issues.detail: The skill does not cover error handling or edge cases, focusing only on happy paths.

scenarios.name: flask-instrumentation
scenarios.rationale: Baseline used the deprecated JaegerExporter with no Resource/service.name, no FlaskInstrumentor, and a single span; treatment used OTLPSpanExporter at jaeger:4317, set service.name via Resource, called FlaskInstrumentor().instrument(), and wrapped each step in tracer.start_as_current_span with span.set_attribute.

scenarios.name: adaptive-sampling-prod
scenarios.rationale: Baseline invented a YAML format that does not match Jaeger's sampling schema; treatment produced valid JSON with service_strategies for payment (1.0) and api-gateway (0.5), default_strategy at 0.1, and operation_strategies dropping /health to 0.001.
